name: Florida

annual_report.name: Annual Report
annual_report.due: May 1 each year (late fee after May 1: $400)
annual_report.notes: Do NOT miss May 1. The late fee is $400 and if you miss the third Friday of September, your LLC is dissolved.

registered_agent.notes: Must have a registered agent with a physical FL street address.

state_tax.notes: Florida has no personal income tax. LLCs taxed as partnerships or sole props pay no FL income tax. Single-member LLCs are typically disregarded entities for FL tax purposes.

notes: Florida's Sunbiz portal is one of the most user-friendly state filing systems. Watch the May 1 annual report deadline carefully — the $400 late fee is a nasty surprise.
